map_npcs.name: CFO Katerina
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue:
...I guess Lyra was right.
...but I suppose I was right as well.
...it turns out, you were the perfect back-up plan in case this happened to me.
...stop the beast up ahead. Its corrupting force is what's been consuming me and the other researchers.
...I know you can do it, I'll just...catch my breath...{objective:Defeat the Core}
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
...
...is that you, {player}?
...please you have to stop me before this thing takes control.

map_npcs.name: Signruler, King of Signs
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue:
Alas, I am defeated...
You were a worthy opponent...
I had no idea the illiterate could be so powerful...
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
OH, YOU THINK YOU CAN PLAY THIS GAME WITHOUT READING A SIGN?!
HOW DARE YOU?!
FACE ME, COWARD!!!

map_shops.greeting_dialogue: Welcome to my store. Buy whatever you need below!
